pr.title: [codex] reclaim exact DB and OS candidates

summary: Reclaims eight exact-match dolphin/OS and dolphin/DB translation units from the previous campaign's archive, registering each as a non-linked CodeCandidate under the dtk-template reporting path so they count in objdiff without affecting the linked main.dol.
decomp_lessons: Reclaiming a small, verified-exact unit from the archive is low-risk: register it as CodeCandidate (compared, not linked), add its splits.txt range, run full configure/ninja/report validation, and it can't affect the linked build.

A function can be byte-exact in isolation yet still break the linker: __OSSetExceptionHandler's split range shares its start address with the global label __OSDBJUMPEND, causing mwldeppc to spin during full link validation, so it must stay deferred until the address-overlap is resolved.
Full-link validation (not just per-unit objdiff) is necessary before merging reclaimed units, because address/label collisions only surface at link time.
smart_moves: Intentionally excluded one otherwise-ready function (__OSSetExceptionHandler) rather than merge a change that made the linker hang, keeping the PR scope to only units that fully validate.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Added splits.txt address ranges for each reclaimed unit (e.g. OSGetExceptionHandler.c 20/20 bytes, DBPrintf.c 80/80 bytes), each 100% function/byte matched per the previous campaign's data.

key_files.role: Registers 8 reclaimed dolphin/os and dolphin/db units as Object(CodeCandidate, ...)
Adds .text split ranges for the 8 reclaimed units
